client = <FlaskClient <Flask 'app'>>

    def test_stock_cannot_go_negative(self, client):
        """库存不能透支"""
        pid = _seed_product(client, stock=10)
    
        # 创建两个各买 8 个的订单
        r1 = client.post('/orders', json={
            'user_id': 'u1',
            'items': [{'product_id': pid, 'quantity': 8}]
        })
        r2 = client.post('/orders', json={
            'user_id': 'u2',
            'items': [{'product_id': pid, 'quantity': 8}]
        })
    
        # 第一个付款成功
        client.post(f'/orders/{r1.json["data"]["id"]}/pay',
                   headers={'Idempotency-Key': 'neg-1'})
    
        # 第二个付款应失败（库存不足）
        pay2 = client.post(f'/orders/{r2.json["data"]["id"]}/pay',
                          headers={'Idempotency-Key': 'neg-2'})
>       assert pay2.status_code == 400
E       assert 200 == 400
E        +  where 200 = <WrapperTestResponse streamed [200 OK]>.status_code

stateJson.sprintGoal: Complete Product CRUD and Order CRUD routes — all basic CRUD tests passing

atus.title: Implement Product Routes (CRUD)
atus.description: Implement product management routes in routes_product.py: GET /products (list all), POST /products (create), GET /products/<id> (get single). Must return correct JSON format with status/data.

atus.title: Implement Order CRUD Routes
atus.description: Implement order CRUD routes in routes_order.py: POST /orders (create with stock validation, total_amount calculation), GET /orders/<id> (with items), GET /orders (filter by user_id/status). Initial status is pending.

atus.title: Implement Order State Machine + Inventory Management
atus.description: Implement order state transitions: POST /orders/<id>/pay (pending→paid, deduct stock), POST /orders/<id>/ship (paid→shipped), POST /orders/<id>/deliver (shipped→delivered), POST /orders/<id>/cancel (pending/paid→cancelled, restore stock if paid). Invalid transitions return 409.

history.result: TestStateMachine 6/6 + TestInventory 3/3 passed, Reviewer approved (implemented alongside ATU-002)

atus.title: Implement Payment Idempotency
atus.description: Implement Idempotency-Key header handling for /orders/<id>/pay. Missing key returns 400. Same key repeated returns same result without re-deducting stock. Different key on already paid order returns 409.

history.result: TestIdempotency 3/3 passed, Reviewer approved (implemented alongside ATU-002)
